g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the BRFSS 2015 dataset used in this project')
sendPrompt('What does the load and inspect step do in the R markdown?')
sendPrompt('Summarise all 5 EDA steps in the R markdown')
sendPrompt('Explain the missing value check in the EDA section')
sendPrompt('Explain the class distribution plot in the EDA section')
sendPrompt('Explain the numeric distribution plots in EDA')
sendPrompt('Explain the binary variable prevalence plot in EDA')
sendPrompt('Explain the Spearman correlation heatmap in EDA')
sendPrompt('Explain the type conversion and factor encoding step in preprocessing')
g.text: Binary → factor · ordinal kept as integer for ROSE

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Winsorisation outlier capping step in preprocessing')
g.text: BMI, MentHlth, PhysHlth capped at 1st/99th pct

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the information gain feature selection step')
sendPrompt('Explain the stratified 80/20 train test split')
sendPrompt('Explain the ROSE oversampling step and why it was chosen')
sendPrompt('Explain the 5-fold cross-validation setup used in modelling')
sendPrompt('Explain the logistic regression model configuration in this project')
sendPrompt('Explain the random forest model configuration in this project')
sendPrompt('Explain the XGBoost model configuration and CV tuning in this project')
sendPrompt('Explain the evaluation metrics used on the test set')
g.text: Confusion matrix · ROC curves · AUC / F1 / Recall

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the variable importance plots for RF and XGBoost')
g.text: RF Gini · XGBoost Gain · GenHlth, Age, HighBP top 3

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What were the final conclusions of the heart disease prediction project?')
